tasks.subject: Task 1: Dependencies and cache configuration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add h3o/lru/dashmap crates and wire a CacheConfig struct into the settings system.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/Cargo.toml`
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/config/settings.rs`
- Modify: `config/service.yaml`

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model -- config`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/Cargo.toml", "antenna-model/src/config/settings.rs", "config/service.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model -- config", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cargo build succeeds with h3o lru dashmap", "CacheConfig deserializes from YAML", "ServiceConfig has cache field", "Missing cache section uses defaults"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement GainCache
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thread-safe per-feed LRU cache for gain values.

**Files:**
- Create: `antenna-model/src/service/cache.rs`
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/service/mod.rs`

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model -- cache --nocapture`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/service/cache.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model -- cache --nocapture", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cache miss calls compute", "cache hit skips compute", "LRU eviction works", "key quantization correct", "per-feed isolation", "invalidate clears feed", "disabled always computes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire GainCache into AppState
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add cache: Arc<GainCache> to AppState.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/mod.rs`

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model -- app_state --nocapture`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/api/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model -- app_state --nocapture", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AppState has cache field", "new() creates cache from config", "existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add H3 schemas
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define H3LinkBudgetRequest, H3LinkBudgetResponse, H3CellResult.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/schemas.rs`

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model -- schemas`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/api/schemas.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model -- schemas", "acceptanceCriteria": ["H3LinkBudgetRequest serde round-trip", "H3CellResult optional g_over_t_db absent when None", "all existing schema tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: H3 link budget service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement compute_h3_link_budget() with h3o cell generation, coordinate transforms, cache, FSPL.

**Files:**
- Create: `antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs`
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/service/mod.rs`
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs`

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model -- h3_link_budget --nocapture`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/mod.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model -- h3_link_budget --nocapture", "acceptanceCriteria": ["h3_resolution_from_frequency correct", "cell counts correct", "FSPL formula verified", "total = loss + fspl"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Handler and route registration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose POST /api/v1/h3-heatmap.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/handlers.rs`
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/routes.rs`
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/service/validator.rs`

**Verify:** `cargo build -p antenna-model`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/api/handlers.rs", "antenna-model/src/api/routes.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/validator.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build -p antenna-model", "acceptanceCriteria": ["route registered", "unknown antenna 404", "n_rings > 10 422", "cache passed to service"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end tests for H3 heatmap endpoint and cache consistency.

**Files:**
- Create: `antenna-model/tests/integration/h3_link_budget_tests.rs`
- Modify: `antenna-model/tests/integration/mod.rs`

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model --test integration -- h3 --nocapture`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/tests/integration/h3_link_budget_tests.rs", "antenna-model/tests/integration/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model --test integration -- h3 --nocapture", "acceptanceCriteria": ["n_rings=0 returns 1 cell", "n_rings=2 returns 19 cells", "center cell minimum loss", "total = loss + fspl", "unknown antenna 404", "n_rings=11 returns 422", "cache consistency"]}
```
